title: MATANA 40 Premium White Plastic Plates with Gold Lace Rim - 20x 26cm Dinner Plates, 20x 19cm Side Plates - Elegant & Reusable Dinnerware for Weddings, Birthdays, Catering, Parties
features: Elegant Design: 40 premium white plastic plates featuring a sophisticated gold lace rim, perfect for adding a touch of class to any event. Set includes 20x large 26 cm dinner plates and 20x 19 cm side plates.

Versatile Use: Ideal for main courses, salads, pasta, desserts, appetizers, side dishes, starters, and more, making them perfect for weddings, birthdays, barbecues, picnics, catering, buffets, and all types of celebrations.
Premium Quality: Made from high-quality PS plastic, these plates are durable, BPA-free, and designed to last. Enjoy the convenience of reusable tableware without compromising on style.
Easy Care: Dishwasher safe for quick cleanup, though hand washing is recommended to preserve the elegant gold rim. Enjoy the beauty and convenience of these plates time and time again.

Perfect for Any Occasion: Whether you're hosting an intimate dinner party or a large gathering, these party plates add a touch of sophistication to any setting. Ideal for both casual and formal events, impress your guests with ease.
description: Elevate your dining experience with our set of 40 premium white plastic plates, featuring a sophisticated gold lace rim that adds a touch of elegance to any event. This set includes 20x large 26 cm dinner plates and 20x 19 cm side plates, making it perfect for both main courses and side dishes. Our plates are ideal for serving a wide range of dishes, including main courses, salads, pasta, desserts, appetizers, side dishes, and starters. Whether you're hosting a wedding, birthday party, barbecue, picnic, catering event, or buffet, these plates are designed to impress. Crafted from high-quality PS plastic, these plates are not only durable but also BPA-free, ensuring safe use for you and your guests. The premium material makes them sturdy enough for reuse, giving you the convenience of disposable plates with the elegance of fine china. For your convenience, these party plates are dishwasher safe, making cleanup a breeze. To maintain the beautiful gold lace rim, we recommend hand washing. This ensures your plates remain in pristine condition, ready for your next event. Whether it's a formal dinner party or a casual gathering, these plates add a touch of sophistication to any setting. Impress your guests with stylish and practical tableware that complements any decor.
